description: LoRA/LAA capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime frontend sync and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose LoRA/LAA as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep backend method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import the existing yunque-client/lora slice only when the LoRA pack is installed and enabled.
